jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at SAIL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, SAIL in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!
